summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Alpha Agency Phase 2 & Phase 3 features: Pipeline Drag & Drop, Budget auto-categorization rules (match_type, apply_to_type), and Budget Forecast (Prévisionnel). All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified working. Fixed 2 issues: API route ordering for reorder endpoint and Select.Item empty value bug.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/pipeline/columns - Returns list of columns (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/pipeline/columns/reorder - Reorders columns successfully (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/rules - Returns rules list (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules - Creates rule with match_type=contains (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules - Creates rule with match_type=starts_with (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules - Creates rule with match_type=exact (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules - Creates rule with match_type=regex (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules - Creates rule with apply_to_type=credit (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules - Creates rule with apply_to_type=debit (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules/apply - Applies rules to uncategorized transactions (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/rules/apply?month=2025-01 - Applies rules with month filter (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/forecast - Returns forecasts list (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/forecast?month=2025-01 - Returns forecasts for specific month (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/forecast - Creates expense forecast (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/forecast - Creates income forecast (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/budget/forecast/{id} - Updates forecast (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/budget/forecast/{id} - Deletes forecast (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/budget/forecast/non-existent - Returns 404 (404)
Backend: GET /api/budget/forecast/comparison - Returns forecast vs actual comparison (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/forecast/copy - Copies forecasts to another month (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/forecast/copy - Returns 404 when no source forecasts (404)
Backend: Budget rules CRUD flow - Complete create/read/update/delete cycle (200 OK)
Frontend: Pipeline page loads with all 5 columns (Nouveau, Qualifié, Devis envoyé, Gagné, Perdu)
Frontend: Pipeline columns have GripVertical drag handles visible
Frontend: Pipeline has cursor-grab class for draggable elements
Frontend: Pipeline has DnD-kit attributes present
Frontend: Budget page loads with all 5 tabs (Vue d'ensemble, Transactions, Catégories, Règles auto, Prévisionnel)
Frontend: Budget Prévisionnel tab shows 'Budget prévisionnel' title
Frontend: Budget Prévisionnel tab has 'Ajouter prévision' button
Frontend: Budget Prévisionnel tab has 'Copier vers autre mois' button
Frontend: Budget Prévisionnel tab shows summary cards (Revenus prévus, Dépenses prévues, Solde prévu)
Frontend: Budget Règles auto tab shows 'Appliquer les règles' button
Frontend: Budget Règles auto tab shows 'Nouvelle règle' button
Frontend: Budget rule creation dialog opens without errors
Frontend: Budget rule dialog has 'Type de correspondance' dropdown
Frontend: Budget rule dialog has 'Appliquer aux' dropdown
Frontend: Budget rule dialog has 'Texte à rechercher' input
Frontend: Budget rule dialog has 'Assigner à la catégorie' dropdown
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route ordering for /pipeline/columns/reorder (moved before /{column_id}), added PipelineColumnReorder model
/app/frontend/src/lib/api.js - Updated reorder API call to use {column_ids: [...]} format
/app/frontend/src/pages/dashboard/BudgetPage.jsx - Fixed Select.Item empty value bug in rule dialog (changed '' to 'all')
/app/tests/test_phase2_phase3_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Phase 2 & Phase 3 features
seed_data_creation: Test forecasts, rules, and pipeline columns created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 & Phase 3 features fully tested. Pipeline Drag & Drop uses @dnd-kit library with GripVertical handles on each column. Budget auto-categorization rules support match_type (contains, starts_with, ends_with, exact, regex) and apply_to_type (credit, debit). Budget Forecast (Prévisionnel) tab provides forecast vs actual comparison with alerts for budget overruns. API endpoint /api/pipeline/columns/reorder now expects {column_ids: [...]} format. Existing rule 'AMAZON' with 'Dépenses uniquement' filter is visible in the Rules tab.
